title: Hornet Removal Upper East Side | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Upper East Side, Manhattan. Fast, safe hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving the UES. Call today!
intro: When hornets establish nests on your Upper East Side property, quick and professional removal is essential for the safety of residents and visitors. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout the UES, protecting townhouses, pre-war buildings, and luxury high-rises from these aggressive stinging insects. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and neighbors.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Upper East Side residents and property managers for years with fast, safe, and guaranteed hornet removal services. Our technicians are extensively trained in handling aggressive hornet species and use professional-grade equipment to ensure complete nest elimination, all at transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: The tree-lined streets and classic architecture of the Upper East Side, from Fifth Avenue's museum mile to the townhouses near Carl Schurz Park, provide ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, awnings, and landscaped areas. Our team is experienced navigating the unique challenges of UES properties, including co-op regulations, tight building proximities, and the need for discreet, efficient service that Manhattan's discerning residents expect.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout the Upper East Side. Once you contact us, we can typically dispatch a technician within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Most hornet nest removals are completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough inspection, safe removal of the entire hornet nest, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on factors like nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. high floors or roof access), and hornet species. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my Upper East Side apartment building or townhouse?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect residents, pets, and the property. We coordinate with building management when necessary and take special care with the historic and valuable properties common in the Upper East Side. All treatments are targeted specifically to the hornets and their nest, minimizing any environmental impact.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets versus wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps (up to 1.5 inches), have white and black or brown and yellow coloring, and build large, paper-like nests often in elevated locations. If you see large flying insects with aggressive behavior near a basketball-sized or larger nest, they're likely hornets. Our technicians can identify the species during inspection and recommend the appropriate removal method. Given hornets' aggressive nature, we always recommend professional identification rather than approaching the nest yourself.
